query:
SELECT 'strains' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM strains
UNION ALL SELECT 'tents', COUNT(*) FROM tents
UNION ALL SELECT 'plants', COUNT(*) FROM plants
UNION ALL SELECT 'cycles', COUNT(*) FROM cycles
UNION ALL SELECT 'dailyLogs', COUNT(*) FROM dailyLogs
UNION ALL SELECT 'taskTemplates', COUNT(*) FROM taskTemplates
UNION ALL SELECT 'taskInstances', COUNT(*) FROM taskInstances
UNION ALL SELECT 'plantObservations', COUNT(*) FROM plantObservations
UNION ALL SELECT 'plantHealthLogs', COUNT(*) FROM plantHealthLogs
UNION ALL SELECT 'plantTentHistory', COUNT(*) FROM plantTentHistory
UNION ALL SELECT 'alerts', COUNT(*) FROM alerts
UNION ALL SELECT 'weeklyTargets', COUNT(*) FROM weeklyTargets;
